description: Enemy-level combat matchups composed from enemy and faction benchmark data.

enemy.corpus-nullifier-crewman.name: Corpus Nullifier Crewman
recommendedStatusPlan: Use fast shield popping and keep a precise answer for the bubble.
Avoid overcommitting to ability loops that fail inside disruption zones.
inheritedFactionPlan: Break shields fast, then pressure health directly with toxin when possible.
Bring answers to Nullifier bubbles and proxy-heavy rooms.
inheritedFactionCautions: Shield-focused enemies can waste slow ramp builds.

enemy.murmur-anomaly-host.name: Murmur Anomaly Host
recommendedStatusPlan: Use endgame-grade generalist damage and be prepared to adapt to encounter mechanics.
Do not assume faction weakness alone solves this target.
inheritedFactionPlan: Bring endgame-grade generalist damage with room for disruption handling.
Expect encounter-specific mechanics to matter as much as faction matchups.
inheritedFactionCautions: Murmur content is mechanic-heavy enough that generic faction advice is only a starting point.
Encounter scripting can matter as much as raw damage matchup quality in this faction's content.

enemy.battalyst.name: Battalyst
recommendedStatusPlan: Avoid over-specializing around one static damage profile.
Use high burst and flexible follow-up damage to stay ahead of adaptation.
inheritedFactionPlan: Avoid relying on one repeating damage profile when adaptation behavior is in play.
Burst windows and varied damage sources are safer than slow single-note ramps.
inheritedFactionCautions: Adaptation-style pressure can punish repetitive elemental planning.
Sentient encounters often demand mobility and target switching, not just DPS.

enemy.ancient-healer.name: Ancient Healer
recommendedStatusPlan: Delete this target early when it is empowering a crowd.
Area damage and spread effects are especially valuable in Infested packs.
inheritedFactionPlan: Prioritize area denial and status spread against clustered targets.
Delete support aura units before focusing bulk swarm damage.
inheritedFactionCautions: Swarm pressure punishes reload-heavy and narrow single-target setups.
Support units can distort normal time-to-kill expectations.

enemy.corrupted-heavy-gunner.name: Corrupted Heavy Gunner
recommendedStatusPlan: Use this enemy as a benchmark for flexible endgame setups.
Favor generalist armor-handling over narrow faction gimmicks.
inheritedFactionPlan: Favor flexible generalist builds because corrupted compositions mix defense types.
Use benchmark targets like Corrupted Heavy Gunner to test armor handling.
inheritedFactionCautions: Specialized anti-shield or anti-armor setups can underperform against mixed rooms.
Void-aligned mixed rosters reward flexible all-rounder builds over narrow counters.

enemy.grineer-heavy-gunner.name: Grineer Heavy Gunner
recommendedStatusPlan: Treat this unit as an armor benchmark.
Favor armor strip, armor bypass, or viral plus slash style setups.
inheritedFactionPlan: Use viral plus slash or heat follow-up for sustained health pressure.
inheritedFactionCautions: Pure raw damage without armor handling falls off hard against elite Grineer.
Heavy units skew survivability benchmarks upward.
